channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Ostium suffers $18 million exploit as oracle attack wave continues to hit DeFi
item.description: A hacker used Ostium's own price-reporting infrastructure against the protocol, submitting falsified future-dated oracle data to manufacture fake trading profits and trigger an $18 million payout.

item.title: The privacy paradox of protecting kids online
item.description: We don’t need to imagine the privacy pitfalls of age verification. They’ve been happening for years, argues Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: To ETH or not to ETH — is SOL the better diversifier?
item.description: In this week's, Morgan Stanley’s Denny Galindo writes that as the crypto market expands, solana has historically been a better portfolio diversifier than ether, despite being more volatile.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $65.5K as more surprise US inflation data sparks three-week BTC price high
item.description: Bitcoin moved up to its highest levels since June 22 as US PPI inflation numbers provided the week’s second surprise macro data drop.

item.title: White House expected to meet with senators to work on ethics concerns in crypto bill
item.description: The most contentious piece of the crypto market structure bill is unresolved in the final weeks of Senate runway, and administration officials are expected to meet on it.

item.title: South Korea to modify 76-year-old law to classify cryptocurrencies as national assets
item.description: The government also reaffirmed plans to pilot tokenized government bonds next year and explore tokenizing state-owned real estate.

item.title: Open USD poses biggest threat yet to Circle's USDC, CoinShares says
item.description: The consortium-backed stablecoin would share reserve income with partners instead of the issuer, pressuring Circle's margins if it debuts in 2026.

item.title: Is Robinhood Chain’s success bullish or bearish for ETH the asset?
item.description: Surging volumes on Robinhood Chain could be very good for Ethereum, but only if the “ETH is money” crowd turn out to be right.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: A timeline of the Ethereum Foundation's ongoing shakeup
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re unpacking the timeline of all the changes at the Ethereum Foundation this year.

item.title: Crypto firms face AML risks during post-MiCA migration, says AMLA chair
item.description: AMLA is expanding its crypto oversight as firms complete the transition to the EU’s MiCA licensing regime.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Rips on Cool CPI
item.description: Circle has a rough day. Pump.fun pumps on first major unlock. And Robinhood Chain sees its first big rotation.

item.title: UK Fraud Review Calls for Judge Training on Crypto Laundering, AI Scams
item.description: A government-backed review says magistrates and judges aren't ready for a coming surge in crypto money laundering and AI-enabled fraud cases.

item.title: BlackRock's crypto assets fall 39% despite $15 billion of net inflows
item.description: BlackRock's digital asset funds attracted $15 billion in net inflows over the past year, but falling crypto prices drove the value of those holdings sharply lower.

item.title: The launchpad that fueled Robinhood Chain's memecoin boom just gave away all its revenue
item.description: Noxa, the launchpad behind CASHCAT's rise, racked up nearly $12 million in fees before going dark, giving away its revenue, and leaving Robinhood Chain's memecoin economy in freefall.

item.title: Japan reclassifies crypto as a financial asset, paves way for tax cuts
item.description: Lawmakers said crypto has outgrown its role as a payment method and requires rules designed for investment products.

item.title: Strategy feels 'very secure' until bitcoin reaches $8,000-$10,000, says CEO
item.description: Le highlighted increasing the U.S.-dollar reserve as an important lever in preferred stock STRC’s recovery back to around $90 having fallen below $75 last month.

item.title: Bitcoin rally cools as investors digest inflation data, oil clouds outlook
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 15, 2026

item.title: Here's why I think Bitcoin drops lower first. Whales are stacking massive $BTC bids below the current price. There's a HUGE wall of buy orders stretching from around $57K down into the high-$40Ks. One single bid alone is worth $81 million at $61,500. Smart - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5qLWtyZF9wTVJ4ZjJDQy12a01menVUckNqendRWVFhVlpXdmljdUFjSi1LckI5Uk9NMTduX09zc0E4WGdtTGxrbktzY0VRbWM3TzhoXy1BOGJGSXNLNENaR0FR?oc=5" target="_blank">Here's why I think Bitcoin drops l…

item.title: Team Behind Ethereum's Institutional Privacy Push Spins Out For-Profit Firm EthSystems
item.description: The startup's backers, including Bitmine and Joe Lubin, are betting institutions need a privacy layer before running money on a public chain.

item.title: Crypto steadies as Middle East tensions counter U.S. inflation report boost
item.description: Bitcoin held steady at a three-week high as rising tensions between the U.S. and Iran reined in gains from Tuesday's softer-than-expected inflation numbers.

item.title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
item.description: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.

item.title: South Korea to bring digital assets under new state asset management system
item.description: South Korea’s Economy Ministry plans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.

item.title: Stripe mounts blockbuster $53 billion bid to buy PayPal
item.description: The bid, made together with Advent, follows an earlier expression of interest. PayPal has been reluctant to engage with the offer thus far.

item.title: BREAKING: South Korea just made crypto part of its national assets. The new National Asset Basic Act brings virtual assets and intellectual property under state asset law for the first time. The framework had stayed unchanged since 1950, previously covering - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1hQ3l4bkJGc3d3T1lHeDM5bndhQUMwOTJMbUtGM01aWl9LV1VzWVd6cXJOSlBQNDlXOUtMWnFvU01RSkhHejR6aGs2WUU2cmJtMWJGOE9XcHQ5d3NuTjctT3psYw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: South Korea just made …

item.title: 🚨 JAPAN JUST FLIPPED THE SWITCH 🇯🇵 Crypto is now officially "financial assets" under Japanese law. Not payment tokens. Not a gray area. Real financial assets, regulated like securities. New insider trading rules. Real disclosure requirements. Exchange - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE91QlBjc0RmNWFpaUtfcUIxalMwVS0weWg1LUpsLXgwMjkxcWlnczhtVnBfQ01yNnVVWXdsWV9EMXpzYzVtcWw2cmhqbVBxdnkwNTVoQzJSS2hya2VZ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 JAPAN JUST FLIPPED THE SWITCH 🇯🇵 Cryp…

item.title: Bitcoin gets new $80K August target: Watch these BTC price levels next
item.description: BTC price upside predictions include $68,000 within two weeks and up to $80,000 next month, contrasting with warnings of a 2022 bear-market rerun for the rest of 2026.

item.title: Czech Republic tells ISPs to block Polymarket after gambling blacklisting
item.description: The Czech Finance Ministry added Polymarket to its blacklist of unauthorized online gambling websites, requiring internet providers to block access within 15 days.

item.title: 💥 BREAKING: Asia is going ALL-IN on crypto. President Trump warned that other nations could outpace the U.S. on crypto regulation. South Korea has now recognized crypto as a “national asset” and plans to tokenize state-owned real estate. Meanwhile, Jap - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1zVFRpay1yaUloR1pYajh1RmZ3ZXJMM0pHN1JzTnktMVI4enI4ZkZvSVhkUDFyVVhXZVQ5U2RCS0d5VXJWR19KbXdSc3N1akIwRU5hdFZURk1iNXdfRjdfYVd3?oc=5" target="_blank">💥 BREAKING: Asia is going ALL-IN …

item.title: US, UK Outline Recommendations to Align Stablecoin and Tokenization Rules
item.description: The joint recommendations back cross-border stablecoins and tokenized markets, setting a shared direction while avoiding binding rules.

item.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK buys another 220K Circle shares despite sell-off
item.description: Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest added $13.9 million worth of Circle shares on Tuesday, extending its July buying spree to 725,517 shares amid a steep stock decline.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇯🇵 JAPAN The world's 4th-largest economy just approved Bitcoin ETFs. Japan's Upper House committee approved the bill reclassifying crypto as a financial instrument, the same category as stocks and bonds. It already passed the Lower House, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5MN3RpQlNabDg5aXFjaGk3RWVmUGRacHdtNThhaEpobDQzMk90TEI4eEU0Q0tGUDFPeWxxNjU3cnFGaDZ6MGo4WmIwVklRaEZPdkpzWnBYNEl1LWdKNlozdmZWQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇯🇵 JAPAN The world's…

item.title: 🇯🇵 BREAKING: Japan passes law officially recognizing CRYPTO as "financial assets". The law expands FSA oversight, opens a path for Bitcoin ETFs and could lower eligible crypto taxes to around 20%. It also adds insider-trading rules, stricter disclosures an - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1IMVdqWFl4UTBOeWl2aXNObjh5R3dqeXRXeWgycTl4NXRwRzhiYUYtZ3hRNWRoWS0yWjFrenF0eTZQd3VTNG9TcUQ5d3ZqdHg4SEdKMF8xaGZaU1RYVmNlTg?oc=5" target="_blank">🇯🇵 BREAKING: Japan passes law offi…

item.title: $ETH has fully reclaimed its key resistance level. If Ethereum manages to hold above the $1,850 level, the pump towards $2,000 will be next. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5xMVFxeFdaSml5UWduTV9qU3lzMlVKV0ZadGp4T0Y2TVYyVGp0aGtINnpLNkhuamVGQU4yR0FkUFJNOWV1VkpWM0xKUmF0T3VsUDRUdWlTNGxTQnhpVHpKZA?oc=5" target="_blank">$ETH has fully reclaimed its key res…

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin tops $65,000 as markets get more good inflation news
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs took in about $181 million on Tuesday, a day after shedding roughly $425 million, per SoSoValue data. Ether ETFs added about $58 million.

item.title: Stripe, Advent offer $53B to acquire PayPal: Report
item.description: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for $53 billion, at a 28% premium compared to the company’s Tuesday closing price.

item.title: UK plans first G7 digital sovereign bond by early 2027
item.description: The security will launch on HSBC’s Orion platform within the BoE and FCA’s Digital Securities Sandbox to test reduced settlement times and costs.

item.title: AI agentic payments enter mainstream as Visa, Mastercard, Ripple back x402 standard
item.description: Forty companies now govern x402, the protocol Coinbase built and handed away. It settled about $24 million across 75 million payments last month.

item.title: Kalshi says CFTC, Michigan orders leave it in ‘impossible position’
item.description: “We are disappointed by this decision and believe it is unfair to Kalshi,” the company’s legal counsel said on X.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $65,000 as cooling U.S. inflation guts the Fed rate-hike trade
item.description: The June CPI print pulled hike odds from 43% to 13%, with analysts now watching the September FOMC meeting for further cues on positioning.

item.title: US freezes $131M in Iran-linked crypto as Middle East tensions rise
item.description: “US Treasury is committed to disrupting and degrading Iran’s illicit financial activities, including its abuse of digital assets,” US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday.

item.title: Sentiment negative, but you all bought Bitcoin today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1zdFJ5VUJVLVVwVnFqYXhySlJBNVk2VGpMdUVsX2RVYWoybV8xM2d0dEhVT0NaeUFMVW1BTUp5M25lVzNYRm9pam9VQTdza1lBS2VFaDNzWlpyMWJSSmNrR09vQi1ZNGs?oc=5" target="_blank">Sentiment negative, but you…

item.title: ETHEREUM - x.com
item.description: ETHEREUM x.com

item.title: Bitmine generated $46M from Ethereum staking last quarter
item.description: Ethereum staking generated 98% of Bitmine’s revenue last quarter as the company’s pivot from Bitcoin mining gained momentum following its March validator launch.

item.title: Interactive Brokers, the Fourth-Largest U.S. Brokerage, Adds Nine Crypto Tokens and Two-Way Stablecoin Transfers Interactive Brokers has added trading support for nine tokens through zerohash: AAVE, APT, CC, LDO, MON, NEAR, XPL, PAXG and UNI. Th - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE96YzBRNU8xa3VCNHFiT3FacUxEbjVxTUg4YzVkUjdydF9lZnlmeGV5YUZTbGUzcmdTeWc4bUwyU2tUVVE5c0JsLTJ4enBlVmNmODJQVGxYXzk1YWFoeEF6Y3JHQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Interactive Brokers, the Fourth-…

item.title: Over 95% of Coinbase’s code is now written with help of AI
item.description: Coinbase’s Rob Witoff said the company is leaning more on AI to help with execution, but still needs high-agency humans for judgment and strategy.

item.title: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune reportedly said the chamber will consider a vote on the crypto market structure bill before Aug. 10, though it’s unclear whether it has enough Democratic support to pass.

item.title: U.S. CFTC moves to stop Kalshi from canceling trades as ordered by Michigan court
item.description: The federal derivatives regulator, which oversees trading at Kalshi, argued it was inappropriate for Michigan to "bully" the firm into reversing trades.

item.title: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
item.description: Backed by Dragonfly, FirstMark and Coinbase Ventures, the startup is expanding software that helps businesses integrate stablecoins into treasury and payment workflows.

item.title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
item.description: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.

item.title: NEW: @MorganStanley has filed updated documents for both their Ethereum ETF and their Solana ETF. Tickers will be $MSSE and $MSOL. Fees will be 0.14%. Launch likely getting pretty close. solana:So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1vbzBXTkFudG9lOXVTR1pwZGF4SEZSMFlnU29ZZWp3Y1VXSG9kdjllOWg1YkhyTVVwbU1QT2tNem13VWV6Z3Z6M0h6X3lYMnA1T01TbVN2TDg4WXc?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: @MorganStanley has filed updated docum…

item.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
item.description: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

item.title: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
item.description: Certain Democrats are taking an increasingly rigorous stand against the crypto market structure bill, which needs a significant number from their party to pass.

item.title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach
item.description: The change in tax policy, expected to affect about 700,000 people in the UK, is tied to the disposal of crypto in lending and liquidity pools.

item.title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
item.description: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.

item.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease
item.description: The Bitcoin miner’s Georgia agreement with an undisclosed investment-grade technology company expands its footprint in AI and high-performance computing infrastructure.

item.title: I loved Brian Armstrong from the moment he walked into my office, but I had already invested in CoinLab, so I didn’t invest at first. But my son, Adam did. I decided Coinbase would have too long a road to success, so I passed. Ouch. I thought retail crypto was to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9IcmNSRmNiZThzQ3BGTnh4Y2k0UFp4WGV2NmxuaTQ4aXZCTS1CVTYxR3RJbDR3TUMtNVBNXzBxVmdpUm9Eblg0UmVZTWh4b1p1S2t3V0lKcy1ZWERHMkZV?oc=5" target="_blank">I loved Brian Armstrong from the momen…

item.title: Bitcoin Ticks Up to $64K Following Largest Inflation Slowdown in Six Years
item.description: Consumer prices cooled more than expected in June, yet geopolitical tensions continue to cast a shadow over crypto prices

item.title: “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU as Action Targets Billions in Ransomware Damage
item.description: Summary The United States, United Kingdom, and European Union announced sanctions targeting nation-state hackers, cybercriminals, and their enablers in one… The post “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU …

item.title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
item.description: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.
